title: Maulve's Scythes
description: A Vanilla+ mod that adds scythes
body: Maulve's Scythes is a Vanilla+ mod that adds scythes as new weapons. These slightly differ from swords, because they always sweep attack. You can also mine crops and other plant blocks in a 3x2 area! --- ## ✨ Content This mod adds various items, including, of course, scythes. - Iron Scythe - Diamond Scythe - Netherite Scythe - Amethyst Scythe These are required to craft the Amethyst Scythe: - Reinforced Stick - Scythed Amethyst Also: Enchantments! - Life Drain (heals player when killing a mob) - Sweeping Arc (increases sweeping range) --- ## ⛏️ Crafting --- ## 🗺️ Roadmap The last update this mod will receive is version 2.0. ### 2.0 - full configuration - NeoForge support - scythes in loot tables (likely end cities and ancient cities) - further balancing #### 2.0 was originally supposed to release in March 2025, but it didn't due to my lack of motivation and time. Don't expect its release anytime soon. --- ## 📜 License This project is licensed under the [MIT License](https://mit-license.org). You may add this mod to your modpack, as long as you give credit.
